name: Bilal Rehman
summary: Full Stack Developer with 7+ years of experience building scalable web and mobile applications. Hands-on expertise in React, Next.js, Angular, Node.js, Python, and AI/ML integration. Delivered production systems across fintech, SaaS, and consumer apps, with a track record of measurable performance and engagement improvements.

experience.title: AI Engineer
bullets: Designed and developed an AI-driven multi-agent investment research platform, reducing manual research time by 90%
Built a voice cloning and speech synthesis web platform achieving 95% accuracy from 3–10 seconds of audio input
Architected end-to-end ML pipelines integrating LLMs with real-time data feeds and REST APIs

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
bullets: Developed a cloud-based auto repair shop management SaaS platform, increasing operational efficiency by 70%
Delivered a redesigned UI/UX that increased user engagement by 25%
Built and maintained RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express, serving thousands of daily active users

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
bullets: Led frontend development of a family task management app using React Native, achieving strong App Store ratings
Integrated AR features, social sharing, and e-commerce functionality into a cross-platform mobile app
Implemented end-to-end data encryption and authentication flows using Firebase Auth and JWT

experience.title: Frontend Developer
bullets: Built responsive property listing interfaces using React.js and integrated third-party mapping APIs
Developed and maintained component libraries used across 3 product teams, reducing UI development time by 35%
Implemented SEO optimisations and performance improvements that reduced page load time by 40%
Collaborated with UX designers to deliver pixel-perfect interfaces across desktop and mobile breakpoints
